verse.name: v1
verse.lines: All praise to Him who reigns above, In majesty supreme, Who gave His Son for man to die, That He might man redeem.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Blessed be the name, Blessed be the name, Blessed be the name of the Lord; Blessed be the name, Blessed be the name, Blessed be the name of the Lord.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: His name above all names shall stand, Exalted more and more, At God the Father's own right hand, Where angel hosts adore.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: His name shall be the Counselor, The mighty Prince of Peace; Of all earth's kingdoms Conqueror, Whose reign shall never cease.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Redeemer, Savior, Friend of man, Once ruined by the fall, Thou hast devised salvation's plan, For Thou hast died for all.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Magnify the name, Magnify the name Magnify the name of the Lord; Magnify the name, Magnify the name Magnify the name of the Lord.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: There's healing in the name, Healing in the name Healing in the name of the Lord; There's healing in the name, Healing in the name Healing in the name of the Lord.

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Jesus is the name, Jesus is the name, Jesus is the name of the Lord; Jesus is the name, Jesus is the name, Jesus is the name of the Lord.
